important.subject: Harshad, tried this?
important.snippet: Hey Harshad, curious to learn about way of acquiring clients through referrals for Saharsh? Our approach takes you viral on social platforms like Facebook and Instagram which builds trust and visibility with consumers while adding Rs. 25,00,000 in topline revenue in a couple weeks. Can we connect for 15 minutes next week to chat? I'd love to give you a demo and share some ideas we've got for Saharsh! Thanks a lot, Lauren VP, Growth | Behind The Brand If not, just reply back "Nope" & I'll vanish from your inbox.
